fixes.description: Removed Warm_Temperature -> FT (+1) direct edge (curated E313).
fixes.reason: T127/T128 pif4 KO under Warm_Temperature predicted increased but expected decreased. Warm->FT direct path bypasses PIF4 dependency on thermoinduction.
fixes.biological_justification: Kumar et al. 2012 (10.1038/nature11216) show pif4 loss-of-function blocks warm-temperature-induced flowering; model should route warm signal through PIF4 exclusively. Reverted because removal did not help — the Warm -| SVP -> FT(-release) arm still carries the warm signal independently of PIF4 in the geometric-mean framework.
